subject: [PATCH 09/14] sunrpc: add netlink upcall for the auth.unix.gid cache

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support for netlink-based cache upcalls for the unix_gid (auth.unix.gid) cache in the sunrpc subsystem. It introduces new attributes and operations to the sunrpc_cache YAML spec, including a new attribute-set for unix-gid and operations for dumping pending requests and responding to user-space requests. The patch also implements callback functions to handle cache misses and multicast events. This change aims to improve the efficiency of cache management in the sunrpc subsystem by leveraging netlink-based upcalls.
